title: Ash-Mark Brokers
atAGlance: The Ash-Mark Brokers are a licensed-deniable network of fixers who trade in permits, manifests, discreet escorts, and dangerous information.
sageNotes: You can spot them by clean gloves in dirty districts. Ash-Mark agents keep ledgers in coded charcoal grids and speak in delivery windows instead of promises. They can source medicine, forged passage tags, and a dozen other miracles before dusk, but each favor carries a debt mark that matures at the worst possible hour. In Emberfall they are tolerated; in Kharad-Vul they are necessary; everywhere else they are blamed after the fact.
gameInformation: Treat as a flexible quest hub with escalating social cost. They can open black-market supply lines, leak troop movement rumors, or broker temporary truces. Debt mechanics: each major favor adds one marker that the GM can spend for complications, side missions, or faction pressure.
